title: Fakemon Iron and Gold
description: This addon will add not only more pokemon into cobblemon,  but will also aim to be compatible with any other addon and mod, so because of this you can enjoy this addon a longside all your other addons and mods for cobblemon.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66d4d1947c2d955e47fe318e92824f715653544c.png)**This datapack for cobblemon aims to add features from many other datapacks, and lots of other features you can find out about below!**

  (More structures, fakemon, regional forms, legendarys, mythicals, and more will be added!)
**key features that are/will be in this addon**
- Mega evolution! either for existing pokemon or new pokemon added by this datapack
- New and more structures to explore to find pokemon new and old forms or even completly new pokemon themselfs.
- Compatibility with all and any other fakemon or regional form addon, to allow you to have fun with your other favorite datapacks for cobblemon
- And of course, lots of regional forms for existing pokemon and lots of fakemon to come to the future.
  (Mega showdown for cobblemon is needed for new moves and abilities)
